data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a temporary equipment loan during repair, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation or details regarding the implementation or availability of a loaner mini-fridge during the repair process. While the linked use case mentions the loaner, there is no concrete evidence to confirm that this requirement has been satisfied, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of a temporary equipment loan being offered or confirmed during repair.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
